blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 103 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
